dismissalText.commentary: Ajinkya Rahane b Mohammed Siraj 14 (14b 1x4 1x6 21m) SR: 100

dismissalComment.html: Siraj knocks him over, and out comes the SIIIUUU-lebration It's a 200th T20 wicket for Siraj and it's brought up in some style. Fuller this time, hint of shape away, but it just seams in a touch. Rahane plays all around it as he tries to whip it away and he turns around to watch his middle stump out of the ground

dismissalText.commentary: Finn Allen c Rashid Khan b Sai Kishore 93 (35b 4x4 10x6 60m) SR: 265.71

dismissalComment.html: got him!! Allen looks up to wonder why?! Rashid takes it on the edge of the deep-midwicket boundary. SK tossed this ball up, and went slow and full on leg. Allen got his front leg out of the way and went heaving through the line, only to be caught this time

dismissalText.commentary: Shubman Gill c Roy b Narine 85 (49b 5x4 7x6 96m) SR: 173.46

dismissalComment.html: well-judged catch at fine leg!! Gill falls right after the break. Anukul at the boundary line tip-toed for a second, before completing the catch with a reverse cup. Gill has started to walk back, but the third umpire will still confirm the cleanliness of the catch. Anukul's back leg is extremely close to the boundary cushion, and the third umpire just wants to confirm if it tickled the boundary. Gill is made to wait. The third umpire wants to check different angles. He's finally satisfied, and rules Gill out. Gill went for the slog sweep off this length delivery, but fell short barely by a centimetre. That's how fine the margins can be
